items.name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
Dior Miss Caro chain bag is here to stay!! Hot all over the internet 🤤 It's bound to be the favorite little bag of the summer 👍 Still features the classic trellis pattern, truly never gets old. Alternating metal chain links and enamel chain links in the same color as the leather ✔️ A god-tier existence, cute and chic, the look is absolutely top-tier! The internal compartment capacity is sufficient for daily use, and it can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or underarm 🤍

items.name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
White in stock!!️
Ange Autumn/Winter Collection, an irresistible elegant aura. Crafted from imported calfskin, featuring oversized diamond quilting that is retro yet stylish. The gold metal handle is engraved with the iconic lettering, and the exquisite pearl lock exudes a sense of high-end luxury. The chain strap is adorned with small pearls, and the multi-compartment design is both beautiful and very practical for daily use. A must-have for little princesses
size:25*16.5*8cm

items.name_en: Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version
items.name_cn:
Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version
【Black Leather with Strap ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this bag is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
